title: AICoderCodeStudyIncrementallyRequest

key.description: Key of AI Coder project. It is required.

suggestNewCodes.description:
When `true`, after loading additional responses the engine may suggest new codes for uncoded segments
(same as the AI Coder **Suggest new codes** option when adding a load; `addNewCodesWhenAddAICoderLoad`).
Default `false` matches the UI default.

description: Contains parameters for incremental study analyzing task.
